Container.Name: AppFlowy-Nginx
Container.Overview: [Step 7/7 · deploy last] Nginx reverse proxy — the single entry point for all AppFlowy Cloud services. Routes HTTP/WebSocket traffic to AppFlowy-Cloud, AppFlowy-GoTrue, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Admin, and AppFlowy-MinIO. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Requires: Custom Docker network named "appflowy" must exist before deploying any container in this stack. Create it via SSH or the Unraid terminal: docker network create appflowy — Network Type is pre-set to "appflowy" by default, verify it is selected.
Container.Description:
Nginx reverse proxy — the public entry point for the entire AppFlowy Cloud stack. Routes:
  • / → AppFlowy Web
  • /api, /ws → AppFlowy Cloud backend
  • /gotrue/ → GoTrue auth
  • /console → Admin Frontend
  • /minio/ → MinIO Web Console
  • /minio-api/ → MinIO S3 API (presigned URLs)

Before starting: Download the nginx.conf from the template repository and place it at /mnt/user/appdata/AppFlowy-Nginx/nginx.conf. Get it from: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vmalinics0/unraid-appflowy/main/nginx/nginx.conf

TLS option A — user-provided certs: place certificate.crt and private_key.key in /mnt/user/appdata/AppFlowy-Nginx/ssl/ and use nginx-https-custom.conf instead of nginx.conf.
TLS option B — Let's Encrypt auto-certs: use nginx-letsencrypt.conf and deploy the companion AppFlowy-Certbot container. Certbot writes certs to /mnt/user/appdata/AppFlowy-Nginx/letsencrypt/ and serves the ACME challenge via the certbot-webroot path mapped below. Restart AppFlowy-Nginx once after initial cert issuance and after each renewal.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: nginx.conf
Config.Description: nginx configuration file. Use nginx.conf (HTTP only), nginx-https-custom.conf (user-provided TLS certs), or nginx-letsencrypt.conf (Let's Encrypt). All configs are in the template repository.

Config.Name: SSL Directory
Config.Description: Directory for user-provided TLS certificate and key (certificate.crt, private_key.key). Required for nginx-https-custom.conf. Create the directory even if empty.

Config.Name: Let's Encrypt certs (optional)
Config.Description: Directory where AppFlowy-Certbot stores Let's Encrypt certificates. Required only when using nginx-letsencrypt.conf.

Config.Name: Certbot webroot (optional)
Config.Description: Webroot directory for Let's Encrypt HTTP-01 ACME challenge files. Required only when using nginx-letsencrypt.conf with AppFlowy-Certbot.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: HTTP port exposed to your Unraid host / LAN. This is the main AppFlowy access port.

Config.Name: HTTPS Port
Config.Description: HTTPS port. Only needed if you configure TLS in nginx.conf.
